title: French biotech stock soars 34% after new data on experimental medicine
summary_full: Shares of French biotech company Abivax soared Tuesday after it released fresh data on its lead drug for bowel disease.
summary_public: Shares of French biotech company Abivax soared Tuesday after it released fresh data on its lead drug for bowel disease.
